title: draba muralis
intro: Draba muralis, also known as Whitlowgrass, is a small, annual or biennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Draba muralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Draba muralis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various preparations to be used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
